meta.title: Damien Hirst Timeline — Life & Worldview Events

ko: Romance in the Age of Uncertainty
en: Romance in the Age of Uncertainty

label.ko: A Thousand Years — 첫 죽음 진열장
label.en: A Thousand Years — first death vitrine
Shark — Saatchi commission, plunge into Mortality

label.ko: Mother and Child Divided — 베니스, 정서적 최저
label.en: Mother and Child Divided — Venice, emotional nadir

label.ko: Turner Prize, 첫 아들 Connor 출생
label.en: Turner Prize, first son Connor born

label.ko: Romance in the Age of Uncertainty — Faith 정점
label.en: Romance in the Age of Uncertainty — Faith zenith

label.ko: New Religion, 셋째 아들 Cyrus 출생
label.en: New Religion, third son Cyrus born

label.ko: For the Love of God 공개 — 양가성
label.en: For the Love of God unveiled — ambivalence
Painting period sustained, Mandala/Sacred Heart expand

description.ko: Bristol에서 출생. 본명 Damien Steven Hirst. 가톨릭 어머니 Mary Brennan(아일랜드계) 양육. 아버지는 자동차 정비공이었으나 어린 시절 떠남.
description.en: Born in Bristol as Damien Steven Hirst. Raised by Catholic Irish mother Mary Brennan. Mechanic father left in early childhood.

description.ko: 양아버지 Bill Hirst가 가정을 떠남. 어머니 Mary가 단독 양육. 가톨릭 종교적 분위기 속 성장.
description.en: Stepfather Bill Hirst leaves the household. Mother Mary raises Damien alone in a Catholic religious atmosphere.

description.ko: 16세에 Leeds Medical School 영안실에 방문하여 시신을 드로잉. 후일 1991 'With Dead Head' 사진의 원천. Hirst 자연사 시리즈의 자전적 발원 장면.
description.en: At 16, visits Leeds Medical School morgue to draw corpses. Source of the 1991 photograph 'With Dead Head.' Autobiographical primal scene of Hirst's Natural History series.

description.ko: 1983–1984년 Leeds의 Jacob Kramer Foundation Course 수강. Goldsmiths 진학 전 단계.
description.en: 1983–1984 Foundation Course at Jacob Kramer in Leeds. Pre-Goldsmiths preparation.

title.en: Enters Goldsmiths — studies under Michael Craig-Martin

description.ko: Goldsmiths College 미술 학위 과정 입학(1986–1989). Michael Craig-Martin이 핵심 멘토. 개념미술과 지시문 기반 작업의 계보 흡수. 같은 동료들과 후일 YBA 형성.
description.en: Enters Goldsmiths BA Fine Art (1986–1989). Michael Craig-Martin as core mentor. Absorbs the lineage of conceptual and instruction-based art. Cohort later becomes the YBA.

description.ko: 런던 Docklands의 빈 항만 건물에서 Hirst가 직접 큐레이팅한 16인 학생 전시 'Freeze'(7.6–9.30). YBA의 사실상 출발점. Charles Saatchi, Norman Rosenthal 등 주요 평론가·컬렉터 방문. Hirst의 큐레이터-작가 정체성 확립.
description.en: 'Freeze' (Jul 6 – Sep 30): a 16-artist student exhibition curated by Hirst himself in an empty Docklands warehouse. De facto origin of the YBA. Visited by Saatchi, Norman Rosenthal, and others. Establishes Hirst's curator-artist identity.

description.ko: 약장 시리즈의 출발점. 약병 라벨의 분류적 시각언어를 진열장 형식과 결합. 약=신앙 등식의 명시.
description.en: Genesis of the cabinet series. Pharmaceutical label-taxonomy fused with vitrine form. First explicit statement of pharmaceutical = faith.

description.ko: Goldsmiths BA Fine Art 졸업. 졸업 시점 이미 Spot Painting·Medicine Cabinet 시리즈 시작.
description.en: Graduates Goldsmiths BA Fine Art. By graduation, the Spot Painting and Medicine Cabinet series have already begun.

description.ko: Carl Freedman과 함께 Building One(런던 Bermondsey)에서 'Modern Medicine'(3월), 'Gambler'(7월) 두 전시 공동 큐레이팅. Gambler에서 'A Thousand Years' 전시.
description.en: Co-curates with Carl Freedman 'Modern Medicine' (March) and 'Gambler' (July) at Building One, Bermondsey. 'A Thousand Years' is exhibited at Gambler.

description.ko: Charles Saatchi가 Gambler 전시에서 'A Thousand Years'를 구매. Hirst와 Saatchi의 역사적 관계 시작. 1991 Shark 의뢰의 직접 동인.
description.en: Charles Saatchi purchases 'A Thousand Years' from the Gambler show. Beginning of the historic Hirst–Saatchi relationship. Direct cause of the 1991 Shark commission.

description.ko: Saatchi가 Hirst에게 £50,000을 제공하며 '내가 무엇이든 만들 수 있는 자유'를 줌. Hirst는 호주 어부에게 14피트 타이거 샤크를 의뢰. 'The Physical Impossibility of Death in the Mind of Someone Living' 제작.
description.en: Saatchi gives Hirst £50,000 with 'freedom to make whatever I want.' Hirst commissions a 14-foot Australian tiger shark. 'The Physical Impossibility of Death in the Mind of Someone Living' is produced.

title.ko: Woodstock Street 첫 개인전 'In and Out of Love'
title.en: First solo show at Woodstock Street: 'In and Out of Love'

description.ko: 런던 Woodstock Street의 빈 점포에서 첫 개인전. 살아있는 나비와 죽은 나비를 두 방으로 분리.
description.en: First solo exhibition in an empty Woodstock Street storefront, London. Live butterflies and dead butterflies separated into two rooms.

description.ko: Saatchi Gallery 'Young British Artists I' 그룹전(3월). Shark 첫 공개. 영국 미술계에 YBA 라벨 정착.
description.en: 'Young British Artists I' group show at Saatchi Gallery (March). First public unveiling of the Shark. The YBA label takes hold in the British art scene.

description.ko: 뉴욕 Cohen Gallery에서 'Pharmacy' 첫 공간 설치. 약장 시리즈가 룸 스케일로 확장. 1998년 동명 레스토랑의 직접 전조.
description.en: First spatial installation of 'Pharmacy' at Cohen Gallery, NY. The cabinet series scales up to room size. Direct precursor to the eponymous 1998 restaurant.

description.ko: 베니스 비엔날레 Aperto 섹션에서 'Mother and Child Divided' 발표. Premio 2000 수상. Hirst의 국제적 정전화 결정 사건.
description.en: Presents 'Mother and Child Divided' at the Aperto section of the Venice Biennale. Wins Premio 2000. Decisive event of Hirst's international canonization.

description.ko: Serpentine Gallery 전시 중, 한 학생이 'Away from the Flock'에 검은 잉크를 부어 훼손. 'Black Sheep'으로 개명 시도. Hirst가 복원 후 재전시. 미디어 화제성 확장.
description.en: During the Serpentine show, a student pours black ink into 'Away from the Flock,' attempting to retitle it 'Black Sheep.' Hirst restores and re-exhibits the work. Media notoriety expands.

description.ko: 'Some Comfort Gained from the Acceptance of the Inherent Lies in Everything'으로 1995 Turner Prize 수상. 영국 미술계 정전화 완료.
description.en: Wins the 1995 Turner Prize for 'Some Comfort Gained from the Acceptance of the Inherent Lies in Everything.' British canonization complete.

title.ko: Maia Norman과의 동거, 첫 아들 Connor 출생
title.en: Lives with Maia Norman; first son Connor born

description.ko: Maia Norman과 장기 동거 시작(공식 결혼은 안 함). 첫 아들 Connor 출생. 이후 두 아들(Cassius 2000, Cyrus 2005)을 더 두며 Devon 양육으로 점차 이동.
description.en: Begins long-term cohabitation with Maia Norman (never formally marries). First son Connor born. Will have two more sons (Cassius 2000, Cyrus 2005), gradually shifting parenting to Devon.

title.en: First US solo show at Gagosian

description.ko: 뉴욕 Gagosian에서 'No Sense of Absolute Corruption'(1996.4.27–6.15). Larry Gagosian과의 본격 협업 시작. 미국 시장 진입.
description.en: 'No Sense of Absolute Corruption' at Gagosian New York (Apr 27 – Jun 15, 1996). Beginning of full Gagosian partnership. Entry into the US market.

description.ko: Royal Academy 'Sensation: Young British Artists from the Saatchi Collection'(9.18–12.28). YBA의 미술관 정전화 결정 사건. Hirst 다수 작품 출품.
description.en: 'Sensation: Young British Artists from the Saatchi Collection' at Royal Academy (Sep 18 – Dec 28). Decisive event of YBA's museum canonization. Multiple Hirst works exhibited.

title.ko: 자전적 책 'I Want to Spend the Rest of My Life…' 출간
title.en: Publishes autobiographical book 'I Want to Spend the Rest of My Life…'

description.ko: Booth-Clibborn Editions에서 Hirst의 거대 자전적 작가 도서 'I Want to Spend the Rest of My Life Everywhere, with Everyone, One to One, Always, Forever, Now' 출간. 작가-브랜드 의식의 정전화.
description.en: Booth-Clibborn Editions publishes Hirst's massive autobiographical artist book 'I Want to Spend the Rest of My Life Everywhere, with Everyone, One to One, Always, Forever, Now.' Canonization of artist-as-brand consciousness.

description.ko: Notting Hill에 'Pharmacy' 레스토랑 오픈(1.21). Hirst의 작품이 가구·테이블웨어·인테리어 전체. 약학적 우주의 일상 거주 가능 형식.
description.en: 'Pharmacy' restaurant opens in Notting Hill (Jan 21). Hirst's works occupy furniture, tableware, full interior. Pharmaceutical universe in habitable form.

title.ko: Pharmacy 레스토랑 폐업, 둘째 아들 Cassius 출생
title.en: Pharmacy restaurant closes; second son Cassius born

description.ko: Pharmacy 레스토랑 영업 종료. 비품·인테리어 일체는 차후 Sotheby's 경매 예정. 둘째 아들 Cassius 출생.
description.en: Pharmacy restaurant closes; fixtures and interior reserved for a later Sotheby's auction. Second son Cassius born.

description.ko: Pharmacy 레스토랑 비품 일체를 Sotheby's London에서 경매(10.19). 367 lot, £11.1M 낙찰. 레스토랑 전체가 작품으로 분해·유통.
description.en: Sotheby's London auctions all Pharmacy restaurant fixtures (Oct 19). 367 lots, £11.1M. The entire restaurant disassembled and circulated as artwork.

title.ko: Romance in the Age of Uncertainty (White Cube)
title.en: Romance in the Age of Uncertainty (White Cube)

description.ko: White Cube 개인전. 12 진열장 + 중앙 십자가 = 12사도 + 그리스도 구조. 신앙기의 형식적 정점.
description.en: Solo show at White Cube. 12 vitrines + central cross = 12 Apostles + Christ structure. Formal apex of the reliquary period.

description.ko: Charles Saatchi가 1991 Shark을 Steven A. Cohen에게 $8M에 양도(Larry Gagosian 중개). 원본 표본은 부패 진행 중. 2007년 새 상어 표본으로 교체. 진본성 논쟁 촉발.
description.en: Charles Saatchi transfers the 1991 Shark to Steven A. Cohen for $8M (brokered by Larry Gagosian). The original specimen is decaying. In 2007 it is replaced with a new shark, igniting an authenticity debate.

title.ko: 셋째 아들 Cyrus 출생, Devon Toddington Manor 매입
title.en: Third son Cyrus born; acquires Toddington Manor in Devon

description.ko: 셋째 아들 Cyrus 출생. Gloucestershire/Devon의 폐허 저택 Toddington Manor 매입. 가족 양육과 작품 보관·작업의 거점화 시작.
description.en: Third son Cyrus born. Acquires the derelict Toddington Manor in the Cotswolds. Beginning of its use as family base and storage/working site.

title.ko: New Religion (All Hallows on the Wall church)
title.en: New Religion (All Hallows on the Wall church)

description.ko: 런던 All Hallows on the Wall 교회 내부에 'New Religion' 박스 세트 설치. 종교 공간 자체가 작품 매체.
description.en: 'New Religion' boxed-set installed inside the All Hallows on the Wall church, London. The religious space itself becomes the medium.

title.ko: Beyond Belief 전 — For the Love of God 공개
title.en: Beyond Belief — For the Love of God unveiled

description.ko: White Cube 'Beyond Belief'(6.1–7.7)에서 다이아몬드 해골 공개. 제작비 £14M, 가격 £50M. 컨소시엄(Hirst·White Cube·Frank Dunphy)에 매각. 가격 책정 자체가 작품 사건.
description.en: Diamond skull unveiled at White Cube 'Beyond Belief' (Jun 1 – Jul 7). £14M production, £50M asking price. Sold to a consortium including Hirst, White Cube, and Frank Dunphy. The pricing itself is the work-event.

description.ko: Goldsmiths 동기·Freeze 동료·평생 친구 Angus Fairhurst가 Bridgnorth 숲에서 목매 자살(3.29). Hirst의 가장 깊은 우정 중 하나의 종결. Sotheby's 경매 6개월 전.
description.en: Angus Fairhurst — Goldsmiths peer, Freeze co-organizer, lifelong friend — hangs himself in a wood near Bridgnorth (Mar 29). Closure of one of Hirst's deepest friendships. Six months before Sotheby's.

title.ko: Sotheby's 'Beautiful Inside My Head Forever' 시작
title.en: Sotheby's 'Beautiful Inside My Head Forever' begins

description.ko: Sotheby's London에서 Hirst 단일 작가 218 lot 경매 시작(9.15). 갤러리(White Cube, Gagosian) 우회 — 작가 직거래의 사상 최대 사례. 같은 날 아침 Lehman Brothers 파산 신청.
description.en: Sotheby's London begins a 218-lot single-artist auction (Sep 15) — bypassing galleries (White Cube, Gagosian). The largest artist-direct sale ever. The same morning Lehman Brothers files for bankruptcy.

description.ko: 9.15 새벽 Lehman Brothers 파산 신청. 글로벌 금융위기 본격화. Sotheby's 경매와의 동일 날짜는 Hirst 작품의 신화로 흡수됨.
description.en: Lehman Brothers files for bankruptcy in the early hours of Sep 15. The global financial crisis begins. The shared date is later absorbed into the mythology of Hirst's work.

description.ko: 이틀 경매 종료(9.16). 218 lot 중 9 lot 유찰, 총 £111.5M(약 $200.7M) 낙찰. 단일 작가 경매 사상 최대 기록. The Golden Calf £10.3M 최고가.
description.en: Two-day auction closes (Sep 16). 9 of 218 lots fail to sell; total of £111.5M (~$200.7M). Largest single-artist auction in history. The Golden Calf takes top price at £10.3M.

title.ko: Wallace Collection 'No Love Lost' — 비평적 실패
title.en: Wallace Collection 'No Love Lost' — critical failure

description.ko: Wallace Collection에서 25년 만의 직접 회화 25점 전시 'No Love Lost: Blue Paintings'(10.14–2010.1.24). 대다수 평론가가 혹평 — Adrian Searle, Tom Lubbock, Rachel Campbell-Johnston 등. 'Hirst가 회화로는 무능하다'는 일반적 평가.
description.en: 'No Love Lost: Blue Paintings' at the Wallace Collection (Oct 14, 2009 – Jan 24, 2010): 25 hand-painted canvases, the first in 25 years. Critically panned — Adrian Searle, Tom Lubbock, Rachel Campbell-Johnston. General verdict: Hirst is incompetent as a painter.

title.ko: 알코올·코카인 의존 공개 인정, 금주 시작
title.en: Publicly acknowledges alcohol/cocaine dependency, sobriety begins

description.ko: 수년간의 알코올·코카인 의존을 공개적으로 인정. 금주 시작. 자녀 양육과 비평 실패 후의 자기 점검.
description.en: Publicly acknowledges years of alcohol and cocaine dependency. Sobriety begins. Self-reckoning after parenting demands and the critical failure.

title.ko: Maia Norman과 별거, Devon으로 양육 이동
title.en: Separates from Maia Norman; parenting shifts to Devon

description.ko: Maia Norman과 사실상 별거(2010~2012 사이). 자녀 양육의 중심을 Devon으로 이동. 후일 Roxy/현 파트너 관계로 이행.
description.en: De facto separation from Maia Norman (2010–2012). Center of parenting shifts to Devon. Later transitions to a relationship with current partner.

title.en: First solo retrospective at Tate Modern

description.ko: Tate Modern 'Damien Hirst'(4.4–9.9). Hirst 첫 영국 미술관 회고전. 73 작품. 비평·관객 모두에게 정전화의 공식 표지.
description.en: 'Damien Hirst' at Tate Modern (Apr 4 – Sep 9). Hirst's first British museum retrospective. 73 works. Official marker of canonization for both critics and audiences.

description.ko: Gagosian Gallery가 전세계 11개 도시 갤러리에서 'The Complete Spot Paintings 1986–2011' 동시 개최(1.12–). 시리즈가 단일 작품의 위상으로 환산되는 미술시장사적 사건.
description.en: Gagosian opens 'The Complete Spot Paintings 1986–2011' simultaneously across 11 city galleries worldwide (from Jan 12). An art-market event that translates a series into the status of a single work.

description.ko: 런던 Vauxhall에 자가 컬렉션 공개를 위한 갤러리 건축 시작. Caruso St John 건축. Hirst의 컬렉터-큐레이터 정체성 회귀.
description.en: Construction begins on Hirst's own collection-display gallery in Vauxhall, London. Architecture by Caruso St John. Return of Hirst's collector-curator identity.

description.ko: Newport Street Gallery 개관(10.8). John Hoyland 회고전으로 출발. Hirst가 컬렉터로서의 영향력을 제도화. 2016 Stirling Prize 수상.
description.en: Newport Street Gallery opens (Oct 8) with a John Hoyland retrospective. Institutionalizes Hirst's influence as collector. Wins the 2016 Stirling Prize.

title.ko: Treasures from the Wreck of the Unbelievable (Venice, Pinault)
title.en: Treasures from the Wreck of the Unbelievable (Venice, Pinault)

description.ko: François Pinault 의뢰의 Punta della Dogana + Palazzo Grassi 동시 전(4.9–12.3). 10년·£50M 제작. 가공의 해방 노예 Aulus Calidius Amphilochus의 침몰선 신화.
description.en: Simultaneous show at Punta della Dogana + Palazzo Grassi commissioned by François Pinault (Apr 9 – Dec 3). 10 years and £50M of production. Mythology of the fictional freedman Aulus Calidius Amphilochus and his shipwreck.

description.ko: Jerry Saltz, Andrew Russeth, Adrian Searle 등 거의 만장 혹평. '돈으로 만든 시각적 자기과시', '가짜의 가짜', '21c 미술의 가장 비싼 실수'. Hirst의 야망 자체가 vanitas의 메타 실현.
description.en: Near-universal panning by Jerry Saltz, Andrew Russeth, Adrian Searle, etc. "Visual self-aggrandizement made of money," "fake of a fake," "the most expensive mistake in 21c art." Hirst's ambition itself becomes a meta-realization of vanitas.

title.ko: #MeToo 운동 미술계 확산, YBA 세대 재평가
title.en: #MeToo expands into the art world; YBA generation re-examined

description.ko: 2017년 가을부터 #MeToo 운동이 미술계로 확산. 1990s YBA 세대의 도발 미학·갤러리스트 권력·페미니즘 부재가 재평가 대상으로. Hirst의 위치도 비판적 맥락에서 재독.
description.en: From autumn 2017, #MeToo expands into the art world. The 1990s YBA generation's provocation aesthetics, gallerist power, and lack of feminism are re-examined. Hirst's position is reread in this critical light.

description.ko: Gagosian Beverly Hills 'The Veil Paintings'(3.1–4.14). 24 점 직접 회화. Bonnard·Seurat 명시. Wallace Collection 비평 실패의 9년 후 재시도. 평론 미온, 시장 반응 호의적.
description.en: 'The Veil Paintings' at Gagosian Beverly Hills (Mar 1 – Apr 14). 24 hand-painted canvases. Bonnard and Seurat explicitly cited. A nine-year-later retry of the Wallace Collection failure. Critically lukewarm but warmly received by the market.

description.ko: Cherry Blossoms 회화 작업 개시. 3년간 107점 제작. mono no aware 명시 차용. 회화기의 정체성 좌표.
description.en: Begins the Cherry Blossoms paintings. Produces 107 works over three years. Explicitly cites mono no aware. Identity coordinate of the painting period.

title.ko: 팬데믹 — Devon 작업실 고립, BLM 운동 확산
title.en: Pandemic — Devon studio isolation; BLM expansion

description.ko: 코로나 팬데믹과 BLM 운동(5월 George Floyd 사후) 확산. Hirst는 Devon 작업실에 고립되어 Cherry Blossoms 작업 집중. 거대 스튜디오 기계의 일시적 정지.
description.en: COVID-19 pandemic and post-Floyd BLM (May 2020). Hirst is isolated in his Devon studio, concentrating on Cherry Blossoms. Temporary stoppage of his vast studio machine.

description.ko: Fondation Cartier pour l'Art Contemporain Paris(7.6–2022.1.2). 107 점 중 30+점 공개. 회화기의 제도적 정전화. Hirst 회화의 박물관 봉헌.
description.en: Fondation Cartier pour l'Art Contemporain Paris (Jul 6, 2021 – Jan 2, 2022). 30+ of the 107 works shown. Institutional canonization of the painting period — Hirst's painting consecrated in the museum.

description.ko: Heni 플랫폼에서 10,000 회화-NFT 쌍을 각 $2,000에 1차 판매(7.14). 1년 내 회화 또는 NFT 중 하나 선택, 미선택분은 소각/소멸. 2008 Sotheby's의 디지털 응답.
description.en: Heni platform launches 10,000 painting–NFT pairs at $2,000 each (Jul 14). Each owner must choose painting or NFT within a year; the unchosen is destroyed/annihilated. Digital response to Sotheby's 2008.

title.en: Currency burning ceremony — Newport Street Gallery

description.ko: 디지털을 선택한 소유자들의 회화 4,851점을 Hirst 본인이 Newport Street Gallery에서 소각(10.11–10.30). 가치 실험의 종결 의례.
description.en: Hirst himself incinerates 4,851 paintings whose owners chose the digital, at Newport Street Gallery (Oct 11–30). Closing ritual of the value experiment.

title.ko: Forgiving and Forgetting (Cherry Blossoms, Gagosian Paris/NY)
title.en: Forgiving and Forgetting (Cherry Blossoms, Gagosian Paris/NY)

description.ko: Gagosian Paris(6월), 이후 NY로 순회. 후기 임파스토. 시장 반응 매우 호의적, 평론 양가적.
description.en: Gagosian Paris (June), then traveling to NY. Late impasto. Very warm market reception; critically ambivalent.

title.ko: Where the Land Meets the Sea (Phillips, Seascape 시리즈)
title.en: Where the Land Meets the Sea (Phillips, Seascape series)

description.ko: Veils 점묘 기법을 풍경화로 확장한 Seascape 시리즈. 회화기의 풍경적 만년 변종.
description.en: Seascape series extending the Veils' pointillist technique into landscape. Late-period landscape variant of the painting era.

title.ko: Looking Forward to a Complete Suspension of Disbelief
title.en: Looking Forward to a Complete Suspension of Disbelief

description.ko: Veils 만년작 표제. Coleridge의 미학 명제 'willing suspension of disbelief'를 인용. Treasures의 회고적 정당화.
description.en: Late Veils titled with Coleridge's aesthetic proposition 'willing suspension of disbelief.' Retroactive justification of Treasures.
